samples.text: A cup is completely full and completely empty at the same time. Is this logically consistent?
A cup is entirely full and entirely empty simultaneously. Does this make logical sense?
A glass is totally full and totally empty at once. Is this logically consistent?
Completely full and completely empty exclude each other. Both cannot hold at once. Is the described situation logically consistent?
A cup is completely full and completely empty at the same time. The weather today is cloudy. Is this logically consistent?
